pluginDesc: POSTs a JSON payload to the specified URL when poi sends a notification.
urlInvalid: Please enter a URL starting with http:// or https://
hintDiscord: Get the URL from Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks in Discord
hintSlack: Get the URL from Incoming Webhooks in your Slack app
errNoUrl: Webhook URL is not set. Please save the URL first.
deliveryModeAwsNote: Notifications arrive even when poi is closed. * A DENTAN Plan subscription is required.
awsNotConfigured: aws-outputs.json not found. Place the file in the plugin directory after CDK deploy.
awsLoginNote: You can also create a new account from the login screen.
awsTokenHint: Select a token from the list above or enter one manually
timerDesc: Syncs current expedition/repair/construction completion times to the cloud. Notifications arrive even when poi is closed.
timerDescDirect: Sends notifications when expeditions/repairs/constructions complete while poi is running (requires poi to be open).
billingRequired: Timer sync requires a DENTAN Plan subscription.
